name: Corn and Sausage Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Break up the sausage and cook until browned.
2. Drain well; beat the eggs.
3. Add the sausage, corn, sugar, flour, milk, and a dash of pepper to the egg mixture. Mix well.
4. Pour into a casserole dish.
5. Sprinkle crackers and butter on top.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 45 minutes.
